exploration_notes:
Traced the G1 concurrent marking and mixed collection cycle across 12 core C++ files:

1. **Concurrent mark start trigger**: `g1VMOperations.cpp` calls `G1Policy::force_concurrent_start_if_outside_cycle()` in `g1Policy.cpp`, which sets the concurrent start flag. `G1Policy::decide_on_concurrent_start_pause()` determines whether to initiate a concurrent start. `g1YoungCollector.cpp` calls `G1ConcurrentMark::pre_concurrent_start()` (in `g1ConcurrentMark.cpp`) when in a concurrent-start GC. `g1Colle
